title: Loan Approval Prediction
description: Develop a machine learning model to predict loan approvals.
business_case_summary:
Business Case Summary: Loan Approval Prediction (DEM-2026-0126)

Executive Summary  
This project aims to develop a machine learning model to accurately predict loan approvals, enhancing decision-making speed and consistency within the Customer Digital domain. Leveraging data-driven insights will improve operational efficiency and customer satisfaction.

Business Value  
Automating loan approval predictions reduces manual processing time and errors, leading to faster approvals and increased throughput. This supports revenue growth by enabling scalable, reliable loan evaluations.

Risk Mitigation  
To address medium-level risks, the project will incorporate rigorous model validation and compliance checks to ensure fairness and regulatory adherence. Continuous monitoring post-deployment will promptly identify and rectify potential biases or performance issues.
